name: Ham and Cheese Appetizers
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Cooked smoked ham, finely chopped
1 cup Shredded Swiss or Cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a rectangular pan measuring 13 x 9 inches.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the Bisquick baking mix, cooked smoked ham, shredded cheese, chopped onion, grated Parmesan cheese, sour cream, parsley, salt, garlic, milk, and egg until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 25 to 30 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
7. Cut into rectangles measuring approximately 2 x 1 1/2 inches.
8. Serve and enjoy your appetizers (36 pieces total).
Note: For high altitude baking (3500 to 6500 ft), preheat the oven to 375°F and reduce the amount of Bisquick baking mix to 1 3/4 cups. Add an additional 1/4 cup all-purpose flour to the mixture.
